arts.ttl: Man City discovered a natural replacement for four players with one tactical change
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has unlocked a replacement for Kyle Walker, Rodri, Kevin De Bruyne and Julian Alvarez in one player - who cost absolutely nothing.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne, Rodri, Bobb - Man City injury news and return dates ahead of Fulham
arts.sum: Manchester City returned to winning ways on Tuesday night with a comfortable 4-0 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Man City equal Man United's Champions League record with Bratislava victory
arts.sum: Manchester City equal Manchester United's Champions League record with a commanding 4-0 away win over Slovan Bratislava.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes Ilkay Gundogan claim after Newcastle display as he hails response from Man City star
arts.sum: Gundogan scored in 4-0 win over Slovan Bratislava

arts.ttl: Phil Foden and James McAtee earn Pep Guardiola’s praise in Champions League win
arts.sum: Rico Lewis also impressed his manager against Slovan Bratislava.

arts.ttl: 'Big knock' - Pep Guardiola explains Erling Haaland substitution in Man City win
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about taking Erling Haaland off against Slovan Bratislava

arts.ttl: Manchester City equal historic Man United Champions League record after easing past Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: Manchester City have now equalled Manchester United for the longest unbeaten run in Champions League history thanks to their 4-0 thrashing of Slovan Bratislava.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden toasts 'dream come true' for Man City goalscorer James McAtee
arts.sum: McAtee scored his first goal for City in win over Slovan Bratislava

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland makes more history as Man City run riot against Slovan Bratislava
arts.sum: SLOVAN BRATISLAVA 0-4 MAN CITY: Pep Guardiola's side have earned their first victory of their latest Champions League campaign with a straight forward victory in Slovakia

arts.ttl: Haaland keeps up remarkable Champions League scoring record as Foden shines for dominant Man City
arts.sum: While Erling Haaland maintained his staggering record of having more goals than games in the Champions League, it was the performance of another attacker that might have given Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola more satisfaction on Tuesday. Foden finished the game as City’s center forward, a role he might have to assume on the occasions Haaland isn’t around given the team sold back-up striker Julian Alvarez during the summer and didn’t sign a like-for-like replacement.
